title: achillea millefolium var. monticola
intro: Achillea millefolium var. monticola, also known as Mountain Yarrow, is a variety of the Yarrow plant, a flowering perennial herb that belongs to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Mountain Yarrow include reducing fever, relieving menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS, and soothing digestive issues. Mountain Yarrow can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various health concerns.
